name: Chicken in Corn Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook chicken in broth with carrot, onion, garlic, and peppercorn.
- Add parsley at the last minute.
2. Remove chicken and strain the broth.
3. Take chicken out of bones and cut into bite-sized pieces.
4. Melt butter until it foams. Stir in flour to make a blond roux.
- Stir in 1 cup broth along with milk, stirring vigorously until slightly thickened.
5. Add drained corn, butter, nutmeg, salt, pepper, cheese, and cream.
- Bring to a boil, stirring.
- Turn off heat.
6. Arrange chicken in layers alternating with corn cream in a buttered baking dish.
- Sprinkle more cheese on top.
7. Bake in 350°F oven until bubbling.
8. Broil until golden brown.
